command: python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_agent_commands.py --mode strict && python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_agent_handoff.py --mode strict && python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_command_chain.py --chain <p5a> && python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_command_chain.py --cross-contract-fixtures <p5b> && python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_command_chain.py --chain <p5c> && python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_command_chain.py --chain <p5d> && make validate

P5-B.description: write_change whitespace-only diff; handoff scope claims major implementation

P5-C.description: validate_change success:true with semantically unrelated checks

P5-D.description: complete chain with no exact_before/exact_after for modify (no operative change proof)
